name: Shenzhen Yinghe Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Yinghe Technology Co., Ltd provides lithium battery production line solutions in China. It offers include automatic pulping machines, coating machines, roll press machines, cutting machines, pelleters, winding machines, die-cutting machines, laminating machines, assembly automatic lines, liquid filling machines, pre-charge machine, PACK automatic lines, etc. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
